name: The Pale Advance
specialty: A formidable team with a knack for uncovering hidden truths and unraveling complex enigmas, setting them apart as the go-to investigators for the Undercity's most perplexing cases.

members.name: Kaelen Evershade
members.note: A stoic man with a perpetual pale expression, his face bears the scar of a past betrayal

members.name: Seraphina Frostwhisper
members.note: Her keen eyes, hidden behind tinted spectacles, reveal a history of tracking down the city's most elusive fugitives

members.name: Zephyr Stonefist
members.note: Known for his indomitable spirit and his trademark warhammer, he exudes an aura of unyielding determination

visual: The Pale Advance are a trio of grim professionals, dressed in all-black attire, adorned with silver sigils of the Obsidian Lotus. They move with a purposeful stride, a sense of quiet intensity following them.
reputation_note: Whispers circulate about their uncanny ability to solve the Undercity's most inscrutable mysteries, but some caution against trusting them too far
